articles.title: Spot ether ETF flows were $0 yesterday, negative $548 million since launch
articles.description: On Monday, net inflows into ether via nine spot ETFs listed on US exchanges posted a disappointing $0 for an entire day.

articles.title: Long-Term Confidence in ETH Grows as Staking Reaches Record Levels
articles.description: Almost a third of all Ethereum is now staked, which signals that traders have strong long-term confidence in the network.

articles.title: Solana to Outperform Ethereum, Bitcoin in 2025 if Trump Reelected: Standard Chartered
articles.description: The bank also predicted that Bitcoin will hit $200,000 by the end of 2025, regardless of who wins the U.S. Presidential election.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation's Latest 2,500 ETH Transfer Stuns Crypto Community
Ether ETFs See Zero Inflows, Ethereum Foundation Continues Selling ETH
articles.description: Coinspeaker Ether ETFs See Zero Inflows, Ethereum Foundation Continues Selling ETH Spot Ethereum ETFs in the US have struggled since their July 2024 launch, recording zero inflows on October 7 and experiencing $550 million in outflows since launch. Ether ETFs See Zero Inflows, Ethereum Foundation Continues Selling ETH

articles.title: Fewer Bitcoin Holders Willing to Sell
articles.description: New data shows that only 10% of Bitcoin holders are willing to sell, signaling growing confidence in its long-term value.
